title: Duplicate tasks without the word copy showing up (similar to a copy paste)
excerpt: Have a way to duplicate a task without the word copy showing up in the title.

posts.author: JOliveira (Jen Oliveira)
posts.cookedHtml: Have a way to duplicate a task without the word copy showing up in the title.

posts.author: Fario_Consulting (Fario Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

You can use the Monday API (with a webhook) to automatically remove the word “copy” from the duplicated task name…

Hope this helps!

Cheers,
Harsh

We empower businesses to unlock Monday’s full potential, driving growth and operational excellence.
Learn more about us on farioconsulting.com

posts.author: abuislam (abuislam)
posts.cookedHtml: That would be a great feature! A clean duplication without “copy” in the title would keep things more organized. Hope they consider adding it!
